heading: Singleton Military Area vs Singletons Mill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Singleton Military Area, New South Wales and Singletons Mill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Singleton Military Area has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Singletons Mill (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Singleton Military Area or Singletons Mill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Singleton Military Area has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Singletons Mill scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Singleton Military Area scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Singletons Mill scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Singleton Military Area or Singletons Mill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Singleton Military Area has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
